coverage_details: Platinum level plan with 89.590% actuarial value. Covers medical, dental, and nursing services. Waived deductible at Howard Student Health Center for specified services. Prescription drugs with tiered copays ($15-$90). Preventive care 100% covered at preferred providers. Out-of-pocket maximum of $7,150 per insured per year. No overall policy maximum limit.
claim_limit: No overall maximum dollar limit on the policy
deductible_amount: $300 per insured person per policy year
filing_instructions: Contact customer service at 1-800-793-0251 or customerservice@uhcsr.com. Refer to uhcsr.com/howard for detailed claim procedures.
claim_exceptions: Student must attend classes for 31 consecutive days to maintain eligibility. Dependents require specific legal relationships (spouse, domestic partner, child under 26). International students need J-1/F-1 or J-2/F-2 visas. Eligibility verification may result in premium refund only if requirements unmet.
